offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent utility bill formats cause reporting errors. We convert raw utility bills into standardized reports instead of manual data entry and reconciliation of utility bills.
problem: Inconsistent utility bill formats lead to errors and inefficiencies in reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for initial setup and monthly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
